title: Systemic brainwashing: Nashik court in order denying relief to TCS Nashik case accused Nida Khan
description: A Nashik court observed that the allegations against TCS employee Nida Ejaz Khan form part of a systemic, organised attempt to “brainwash” a Dalit colleague and push her towards religious conversion [Nida Khan v. State of Maharashtra & Anr.].Additional sessions judge KG Joshi made the observation while rejecting her plea for anticipatory bail in the sexual and religious harassment case.“The alleged offence seems to be a systematic plan of brainwashing of the victim with organised attempts,"
